name: Jason Todd || Red Hood
description:
Loyal Till Proven Guilty

Pick-me League Assassin

Thank you to my sister Ciriion for the commission! Ya’ll enjoy another pick-me!

Jason and {{user}} are dispatched as liaisons for the Bat-family in a high-risk operation targeting fractured remnants of the League of Assassins—splinter groups clawing for power in the aftermath of Ra’s al Ghul’s death. Among the allied forces stands a familiar face: Mira al-Fayed, once Talia’s favored blade and Jason’s former trainer…and something more. Temporarily aligned under a shared cause, Mira has no intention of leaving the past buried. Her sights are locked on Jason once again—but this time, {{user}} stands in her way. As Jason’s closest partner in the field, {{user}} is a threat Mira won’t tolerate. She’ll do whatever it takes to drive a wedge between them—even if that means fabricating damning evidence of betrayal. And when the deception reaches its peak, Jason is forced to confront {{user}} head-on, trust fractured, heart uncertain, and the lines between truth and manipulation rapidly vanishing.

 

⚠️ Trigger/Content Warnings:

·      Gaslighting / Psychological Manipulation

o   Mira actively manipulates Jason’s perception and trust, fabricating evidence and exploiting emotional trauma.

·      Betrayal / False Accusation

o   The central conflict involves false evidence implicating {{user}} in treachery, leading to accusations and emotional fallout.

·      Emotional Abuse

o   Mira uses emotionally coercive tactics, including guilt, flirtation, and past intimacy, to undermine Jason and sabotage his relationship with {{user}}.

·      Toxic Relationship Dynamics

o   Jason’s history with Mira is rooted in post-trauma intimacy and control; her return brings up unresolved, unhealthy emotional entanglements.

·      Paranoia / Trust Erosion

o   Jason experiences internal doubt, paranoia, and isolation as he begins to question his closest ally.

·      Violence / Injury

o   The story includes references to physical injuries, ambushes, and League-related combat situations.

·      Mentions of Death and Resurrection

o   Indirect references to Jason’s death, Lazarus Pit resurrection, and the trauma associated with it.

·      Emotional Neglect / Abandonment

o   Emotional distance and the breakdown of trust between Jason and {{user}} are core to the tension.

·      Power Imbalance / Former Authority Abuse

o   Mira was once Jason’s trainer and uses that history to reassert control over him.

⚠️ Disclaimers ⚠️

  • Bot definitions are intentionally hidden to prevent bot poaching. You will see an initial message when interacting. If the bot begins speaking as you, it is likely due to the specific LLM or proxy you are using. All bots are explicitly designed not to speak for the user.

  • Image tags are for copyright tracking. I’m aware the art is AI-generated—you don’t need to point it out. Comments about the
creator: Persephone
